what: BSK=128 NW=4 NS=2 for M=64 fused path (from BSK=256). Halves per-iteration work, doubles K-iterations from 8 to 16 for K=2048. Smaller A/B/scale loads per iteration reduce register pressure, better pipeline fill with 16 stages. MFMA does 1 instruction per iter instead of 2, but 2x more pipeline stages. BSK=128 never tested for M=64.
why: M=64 is a dominant LB shape (~13us). Current BSK=256 NW=4 NS=2 does 8 K-iterations. BSK=128 enables 16 iterations with halved per-iteration memory footprint, potentially improving software pipelining efficiency on CDNA4. No prior BSK=128 test for any fused shape.

what: cache_modifier=.cg for M<=32 K>1024 path (from None). BSM=32/BSN=64/BSK=512/NW=8/NS=1 with .cg bypasses L1 for B loads, reducing L1 contention. Affects M=32 K=4096 and M=32 K=2880 LB shapes. .cg is optimal for large-K shapes (split-K uses .cg). Never tested: M<=32 K>1024 always used library default (None).
why: M=32 K=4096/K=2880 are LB shapes hitting the M<=32 K>1024 path. With BSK=512, each K-iteration loads 16KB B data. 8 K-iterations total 128KB B per block. .cg bypasses L1 to avoid thrashing the 32KB L1, matching split-K path strategy. Library default None was never questioned for this path.

what: waves_per_eu=1 for M<=32 K<=1024 fused path (from 2). Affects M=32 N=4096 K=512 and M=32 N=2880 K=512 LB shapes. waves=0 tested (v203 +1.4%), waves=2 current (v211), waves=1 never tested for this path. Intermediate occupancy hint may balance register pressure vs CU utilization.
why: M=32 K=512 shapes contribute to geomean at 6.3-6.5us. waves_per_eu=2 may over-restrict register allocation for BSM=8/BSN=128/BSK=256. waves=1 provides a middle ground between auto (0) and maximum (2) occupancy hints. Never tested on this specific path.

what_failed: v215: BSK=128 for M=64 failed at compilation (preshuffle kernel requires BSK>=256 for scale reshape). v216: .cg for M<=32 K>1024 path +1.1% (neutral/regression, M=32 K=512 LB shapes hit K<=1024 path not K>1024). v217: waves_per_eu=1 for M<=32 K<=1024 pending LB (server congestion prevented result).
